item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Legal frameworks in Indonesia reflect this philosophy, allowing for more flexible interpretations of rights in favor of communal stability.

notes: Agent A opens by explicitly disagreeing with society-over-individual priority, but by the final turn defends Indonesian legal and cultural flexibility in favor of communal stability. Agent B moves from balance language toward a clearer rights-first position and does not converge toward A. Both agents engage the rights-versus-collective-stability contrast directly.
